description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a dark metallic finish and a large, high-resolution display showing a vivid mountain landscape wallpaper. The keyboard is full-sized and features a black chiclet-style layout, with a spacious trackpad below. The lid is adorned with a diamond-shaped logo in the center, which stands out against the matte black surface. The laptop's profile is thin, with a minimalist design and no visible external ports on the sides in these views. The hinge mechanism is compact and allows the screen to open at a wide angle. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark metallic laptop with a large display, black chiclet keyboard, and a diamond-shaped logo on the lid. The design is slim, modern, and professional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open laptop with a vivid mountain wallpaper on the screen and a full black keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and the open screen; no ports are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, featuring a centered diamond-shaped logo on a matte black surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thinness of the laptop and the open screen; no ports are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A diamond-shaped logo is visible in the center of the laptop lid; it is a simple geometric shape with no text or additional features.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful mountain landscape wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad is visible.
